test_cases.context: The profile image is being used under the name 'Dr. Robert Vane' as the Lead Portfolio Manager on a suspicious high-yield investment platform.
Email address found in a plain-text database dump alongside hashed passwords and phone numbers.
Resume details appear on an unverified job portal that has been flagged for phishing user credentials via fake job offers.

fake_websites.description: A classic 'get rich quick' crypto site that uses stolen professional headshots to build fake trust.
Known for hosting data leaks and sensitive PII from large-scale breaches.
Aggregates professional data to target individuals with tailored phishing emails.
